prompt: Refactor type definitions to enforce strict enum usage instead of string defaults.
Fix the error message for missing client_secret_jwt JWS algorithm configuration.
Update the client authentication interface to accept both CryptoKey and legacy PrivateKey/PublicKey types.
Refactor the codebase to enforce stricter type checking and remove implicit any types.
Refactor nonce validation errors to use a consistent OPE error type instead of mixing it with TypeError.
Refactor the codebase to remove support for legacy HMAC algorithms and update related type definitions.
Refactor the OAuth public key configuration object to use a single structured format instead of separate properties.
Fix the redundant null check and ensure the key instance validation uses optional chaining.
